title: Deadwood Dick
writer: Wyndham Gittens, Morgan Cox, George H. Plympton
actors: Donald Douglas, Lorna Gray, Harry Harvey
plot: Deadwood Dick, a masked and mysterious hero, is in reality Dick Stanley, editor of the Dakota Pioneer Press and a leading member of Statehood For Dakota. He is on the trail of a masked villain known as the Skull, who leads a viole...
